first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify the candidate as overqualified for a junior role and note a lack of specific Java experience. The minor differences in wording are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and show no connection to the significant change in work location from various Western cities to Kenya.
